planSummary: Manual QA of /departments list + create/edit/delete dialogs.
runSummary: Chrome DevTools MCP session on localhost:5103 with empty seed (dept created during test).

cases.text: Navigate to /departments. Expect 200, StatsGrid (4 cards), FilterBar, DataTable. Table renders 3 columns (Name/Categories/Status) — simpler than plan spec (7). No console errors.

cases.summary: Create dialog — empty submit shows Arabic validation on nameAr and nameEn
cases.text: Open 'إضافة قسم' and submit empty. Expect 'هذا الحقل مطلوب' on both nameAr and nameEn (both required).

cases.summary: Create submits and row appears with StatsGrid increment
cases.text: Fill nameAr='قسم اختبار QA', nameEn='QA Test Dept', icon='stethoscope', sortOrder=5. Submit. Expect POST 201 and row visible.
Type 6 chars 'اختبار'. Expect 1 request. Observed: 6 requests — no debounce in the departments hook.
Select 'غير نشط'. Expect request with isActive=false and empty state.
Open delete dialog. Expect description contains the row name. Observed: 'هل أنت متأكد من حذف «قسم اختبار QA»؟ لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء.'.
Confirm delete. Expect row removed, StatsGrid total=0.
